name: MelodyFlow v0.1.0
body:
Initial release of MelodyFlow Android music player.

## Features
- Music search and online playback
- Real-time lyrics display with fullscreen mode
- Favorite songs management
- Playlist import support
- Local music scanning
- Landscape and portrait screen support
- Material Design 3 UI

## Known Issues
- Lyrics close button may become unresponsive after multiple open/close cycles. Use back button as workaround.
